docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/13/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PAUL HARRELL APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT HORACE JOHNSON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRELL, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, HORACE $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,040.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY HARRELL, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, HORACE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.
